achievements.title: Never Stop Chuckling
achievements.description: Defeat Knuckles in Story Mode (Unlocks Samba De Amigo table).
achievements.author: AmericanSlacker

achievements.title: 15 Million Miles [Tails] Per Hour
achievements.description: Defeat Tails in Story Mode (Unlocks Slots table in Casinopolis).
achievements.author: AmericanSlacker

achievements.title: Green Around the Gills, Pink Around the Quills
achievements.description: Defeat Amy in Story Mode (Unlocks Bingo table in Casinopolis).
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Strange, Isn't It?
achievements.description: Defeat Metal in Story Mode (Unlocks...another Story mission).
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Eggs Over Hard
achievements.description: Defeat Dr. Eggman in Story Mode (Unlocks...a credits scroll! Congrats!).
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Trust No one, Not Even Yourself
achievements.description: Successfully complete Knuckles' Story mission with Knuckles as the active board character.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Flip Right to Lose
achievements.description: Defeat Knuckles in Story Mode without using the right flipper and without losing a ball (never press the A button [you'll need to reasign the plunger to a different button]). NOTE: Must use default right flipper controls.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: A Tale of Two Tails...or is That Four Tails?
achievements.description: Successfully complete Tails' Story mission with Tails as the active character.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Tails' Spinball Adventure
achievements.description: [Sonic] In Arcade mode, switch to Tails in the Character Change event.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Sonic Pinball Party & Knuckles
achievements.description: [Sonic] In Arcade mode, switch to Knuckles in the Character Change event.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: It Looked so Cute, I Had to Play it
achievements.description: [Sonic] In Arcade mode, switch to Amy in the Character Change event.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Full Blue Circle
achievements.description: [Sonic] In Arcade mode, switch back into Sonic in the Character Change event.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: It's Like They're Made For Me
achievements.description: [Sonic] Activate the RING event in Arcade Mode.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Time to Scramble
achievements.description: [Sonic] In Arcade mode, activate the EGG event. Defeat Eggman to move on to the next Zone!
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Open Your Heart
achievements.description: [Sonic] Activate Multiball by first hitting the Intergalactic hole 3 times, then locking 3 balls in the left ramp.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: I'm Seeing Double
achievements.description: [Sonic] Activate all 3 lights above the bumpers and hit the right ramp to increase your field multiplier.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: I ZONEd Out...What'd I Get?
achievements.description: [Sonic] Hit all of the drop targets to spell ZONE and then hit the event hole for a random bonus!
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: A Mighty Party of One
achievements.description: [Sonic] Activate Jackpot mode with a single ball by hitting the event hole 3 times on a single zone via the "I ZONEd Out...What'd I Get?" method.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Extra Extra, Speed All About it!
achievements.description: [Sonic] Get an Extra Ball by hitting the Extra Ball ramp 20 times (the ramp accessible by the upper right flipper [a great way to farm balls]).
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Tikal's Pride and Joy
achievements.description: [Sonic] Increase your bonus multiplier by fully evolving the top Chao.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Chao-abunga
achievements.description: [Sonic] Activate a minigame by hitting the Chao Drive hole 3 times.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Chaos Driven
achievements.description: [Sonic] Successfully complete any Goal-centric Chao Drive minigame on Sonic's table.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Spelling Bee Champion
achievements.description: [Sonic] Spell "SONIC" by activating all of the bottom drain lights. This resets your kickbacks!
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Cling Ring
achievements.description: [Sonic] Collect 25 rings in a single RING Event.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Ring Fling
achievements.description: [Sonic] Collect 50 rings in a single RING Event.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Schwing Ring
achievements.description: [Sonic] Collect 75 rings in a single RING Event.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Ring King
achievements.description: [Sonic] Collect 100 rings in a single RING Event.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Eggcellent Skill Shot
achievements.description: [Sonic] Earn the Skill Shot bonus on Sonic's table by hitting the left ramp 1st thing after a new ball.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Honey, Big, and Blaze Have This in Common
achievements.description: [Sonic] Obtain 9 balls on the Sonic table.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Super Sonic Racing
achievements.description: [Sonic] During the Zone transition countdown, obtain a score bonus 10 times before time runs out in Arcade Mode.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Neato Neo
achievements.description: [Sonic] Neo Green Hill Zone cleared in Arcade mode. Please note: all table progression achievements do not allow in-game saving/continuing.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Don't Tell Anyone
achievements.description: [Sonic] Secret Base Zone cleared in Arcade mode.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Gambling Problem
achievements.description: [Sonic] Casino Paradise Zone cleared in Arcade mode.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: You're as Cool as Ice
achievements.description: [Sonic] Ice Mountain Zone cleared in Arcade mode.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: I'm In Heaven
achievements.description: [Sonic] Angel Island Zone cleared in Arcade mode.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Making a Space Omelette
achievements.description: [Sonic] Egg Rocket Zone cleared in Arcade mode.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Sonic Isn't Even in Project X Zone
achievements.description: [Sonic] X-Zone cleared in Arcade mode.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: What a Super Session!
achievements.description: [Sonic] Become Super Sonic by collecting 700 rings and finishing X-Zone.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: I've Come to Make an Announcement
achievements.description: [Sonic] Moon Zone cleared. Way to go!
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Egg Carrier Meet my Derriere
achievements.description: [Sonic] Blow up the Egg Carrier on X-Zone. Note: This is the upper left level specific target.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: I! HATE! THAT! HEDGEHOG!!!
achievements.description: [Sonic] Blow up Eggman's robot on Moon Zone. Note: This is the upper left level specific target.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Hyper Sonic
achievements.description: [Sonic] Complete every Sonic stage including Moon Zone without losing a ball.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Extreme Gear, Extreme Save
achievements.description: [Sonic] Save a guttering ball before it's lost on Sonic's table. Checks ball's position at about midtable for "safety." Multiball is not allowed.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: A Shadow of his Former Self
achievements.description: [Sonic] Get over 150,000,000 in Arcade mode to beat Shadow's Sonic high score.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: A DASH of Protection
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Spell "DASH" in the drain lanes, enabling kickback on the NiGHTS table.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: I've got an Idyea
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] In Arcade mode, collect your first Idyea: collect all 5 to challenge the boss!
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Get Blue Sphe-I MEAN Chips
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Activate Blue Chips mode in Arcade Mode.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Back in '96, This Would Have Destroyed the Ideya Capture
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Collect 20 chips in a single Blue Chip event.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Elliot and Claris Would be Proud
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Collect 50 chips in a single Blue Chip event.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Extra Extra, Dream All About it!
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Earn an extra ball from hitting the Extra Ball ramp 10 times.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Split Personality Disorder
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Activate Multiball on NiGHTS. Lock 3 balls in the smaller left ramp (the extra ball ramp in normal play).
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Getting Loopy
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] In a single boss session, defeat a boss using only paraloops (hitting the small DRMY ramp doing a quick circle around it [final hit can be a big loop]).
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Knockout!
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] In a single boss session, defeat a boss using only direct boss hole shots (final shot can actually be anything).
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Death Happens in Threes
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] In a single boss session, defeat a boss in only 3 hits using the big loop (must enter from the left).
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Dreaming of a High Score
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Activate the field multiplier by taking the big loop and hitting the spinner. Can you get the X8 Max?
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: What Does ECN Mean? It's so DRMY!
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Hit all 3 ECN drop targets and do four miniloops in the upper right corner to activate a bonus multiplier!
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Acrobatic Antics
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Activate Acrobat mode by shooting the Pian hole 3 times, spelling FLY.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Wonderful Acrobat
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Pull off at least 10 moves to get a WONDERFUL bonus in Acrobat mode.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Marverous Acrobat
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Pull off at least 20 moves to get a MARVEROUS [sic] bonus in Acrobat mode.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Dreamy Acrobat
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Pull off at least 24 moves to get a DREAMY bonus in Acrobat mode. It's the highest rank!
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Don't Err: AIR
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Activate Minigame mode by hitting the AIR hole 3 times.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Any Time Any Place
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Successfully complete any Goal-centric minigame on NiGHTS' table.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Jackle Approved
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Activate Single Ball Jackpot Mode by hitting the Random Bonus hole 3 times (same hole used for obtaining an Ideya, but outside of Dualized Mode).
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: A MAP to...What Exactly?
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Hit all 3 MAP drop targets...what's it do???
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Excellent Entrance
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Hit the skill shot on NiGHTS' table by hitting the DRMY loop 1st thing after a new ball.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Clawz Envy
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Obtain 9 balls on the NiGHTS Table.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: IDEAL
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Spring Hill cleared. Take that, Gillwing! Arcade Mode only. Please note: all table progression achievements do not allow in-game saving/continuing.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: AFFECTION
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Splash Garden cleared. Take that, Puffy!
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: POSSIBILITY
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Mystical Woods cleared. Take that, Clawz! Wait...this isn't your home! Where's Gulpo?
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: CONSCIOUSNESS
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Frozen Bell cleared. Take that, Gulpo! So that's where you went!
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: CONFUTION
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Soft Museum and typos cleared. Take that, Jackle!
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: REVIVAL
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Stick Canyon cleared. Take that, Reala!
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Overcoming My Nightmares
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Reach Twin Seeds (collect 500 Blue Chips before clearing Stick Canyon to enter).
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: GROWTH
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Twin Seeds cleared. Take that, Wizeman!
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: A Wise Man Said "Kill Wizeman Dead"
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Complete every NiGHTS stage and defeat Wizeman without losing a ball.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: It's a Christmas Miracle!
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Save a guttering ball before it's lost on NiGHTS' table. Checks ball's position at about midtable for "safety." Multiball is not allowed.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Rouge's Wild NiGHTS
achievements.description: [NiGHTS] Get over 100,000,000 in Arcade mode to beat Rouge's NiGHTS high score.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Dance My Friend
achievements.description: [Samba de Amigo] Activate Song Play Mode on the Samba de Amigo table.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: How Did Rhythm Pinball Not Take Off?
achievements.description: [Samba de Amigo] Get an 'A' rank on any song in Song Play mode on the Samba de Amigo table.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Spanish I
achievements.description: [Samba de Amigo] Activate the Letter Event on the Samba de Amigo table by hitting the bumpers 30 times.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Spanish II
achievements.description: [Samba de Amigo] Clear the Letter Collection event on the Samba de Amigo table.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Regenerado mi Tambor
achievements.description: [Samba de Amigo] Regenerate your kickback drums by shooting the mini ramps on the Samba de Amigo table. Bingo and Bongo thank you.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: I Got A FEVER
achievements.description: [Samba de Amigo] Activate Fever Mode on the Samba de Amigo table. See the forum for a Song Guide.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Vamos A Carnival
achievements.description: [Samba de Amigo] Get over 90% in the rhythm minigame in FEVER Play Mode on this song.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Burning Hearts
achievements.description: [Samba de Amigo] Get over 90% in the rhythm minigame in FEVER Play Mode on this song.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Dreams Dreams
achievements.description: [Samba de Amigo] Get over 90% in the rhythm minigame in FEVER Play Mode on this song.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: We Are Burning Rangers
achievements.description: [Samba de Amigo] Get over 90% in the rhythm minigame in FEVER Play Mode on this song.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Phantasy Star Online
achievements.description: [Samba de Amigo] Get over 90% in the rhythm minigame in FEVER Play Mode on this song.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Can Still See The Light
achievements.description: [Samba de Amigo] Get over 90% in the rhythm minigame in FEVER Play Mode on this song.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Chu Chu Rocket
achievements.description: [Samba de Amigo] Get over 90% in the rhythm minigame in FEVER Play Mode on this song.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Chu Chu Fever
achievements.description: [Samba de Amigo] Get over 90% in the rhythm minigame in FEVER Play Mode on this song.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Mambo De Verano
achievements.description: [Samba de Amigo] Get over 90% in the rhythm minigame in FEVER Play Mode on this song.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Perfect Play
achievements.description: [Samba de Amigo] Get a perfect score on any song in the rhythm minigame in FEVER Play Mode.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: ¿Que es "Tilt?"
achievements.description: [Samba de Amigo] Spell out "FEVER" without hitting the ball with your flippers. B button is your friend! Must be immediately after 1st launch.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Dancing All Night
achievements.description: [Samba de Amigo] Get over 90% on every song in Fever Mode on the Samba de Amigo table in a single session.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: ¿Es Problemo, Mi Amigo?
achievements.description: [Samba de Amigo] Get over 50,000,000 points to get on the in-game high score board on the Samba De Amigo table. Good luck!
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Frijoles Saltarines
achievements.description: [Samba de Amigo] Save a guttering ball before it's lost on Samba de Amigo's' table. Checks ball's position at about midtable for "safety."
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Cream's Bunny Money
achievements.description: [Casinopolis] Win a bet on the Roulette table.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Fang's One Armed Bandit
achievements.description: [Casinopolis] Win on the Slots table. You've got a Nack for this!
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Bark and Bean's Bingo
achievements.description: [Casinopolis] Win on the Bingo table.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Ring Collector
achievements.description: Save up 1,000 rings/blue chips across all play sessions.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Omochao is Useful
achievements.description: Check out Omochao's advice for all 3 tables in Tutorial mode, one after the other.
achievements.author: AfroRyan

achievements.title: Omochao is Useless
achievements.description: Turn off "Chao Navi" under Options. This will get rid of the in-game bottom tutorial text, and give you more screen real estate!
achievements.author: AfroRyan
